body.title: Lightweight Authorization using Ephemeral Diffie-Hellman Over COSE (ELA)
Implementation Considerations for Ephemeral Diffie-Hellman Over COSE (EDHOC)
Coordinating the Use of Application Profiles for Ephemeral Diffie-Hellman Over COSE (EDHOC)
KEM-based Authentication for EDHOC in Initiator-Known Responder (IKR) Scenarios
Post-Quantum EDHOC - Initiator and Responder using signature and/or KEM
03-Lopez-Formal Analysis of Remote attestation over EDHOC
04-Sardar-From formal analysis of attested TLS to attested EDHOC
06-Fedrecheski-Lightweight Authorization using Ephemeral Diffie-Hellman Over COSE
07-Tiloca-Implementation Considerations for Ephemeral Diffie-Hellman Over COSE (EDHOC)
08-Tiloca-Coordinating the Use of Application Profiles for Ephemeral Diffie-Hellman Over COSE (EDHOC)
09-10-Pocero-Updates on KEM-based Authentication methods for EDHOC
11-Papon-Post-Quantum EDHOC - Initiator and Responder using signature and/or KEM
